arts.ttl: Lille predicted XI v Atletico Madrid: Mitchel Bakker adds to growing injury list
arts.sum: Lille OSC head into their UEFA Champions League encounter against Atletico Madrid severely depleted. Mitchell Bakker, substituted early in the game against AS Monaco on Friday, is the latest casualty…

arts.ttl: Callum McGregor looks to surpass 'magic night' in Italy with Atalanta heroics as he reveals Champions League homework
arts.sum: The Hoops skipper still looks back on that famous win over Lazio in the Europa League with nothing but fond memories

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel reveals Brendan Rodgers lesson that has been most important to the Celtic goalkeeper
arts.sum: The veteran Denmark stopper joined his old Leicester City boss at Parkhead in the summer to replace Joe Hart

arts.ttl: How close Ademola Lookman was to Celtic move before Atalanta superstardom as London summit revealed
arts.sum: The Hoops boss almost managed to tempt the Atalanta hero to Parkhead during his first spell as boss

arts.ttl: Critics waiting for Celtic to slip up - Rodgers
arts.sum: Speaking before Celtic's Champions League match with Atalanta, manager Brendan Rodgers says his side's critics are waiting for them to slip up.

arts.ttl: Who will win Atalanta vs Celtic? Our writers deliver their predictions with Champions League goalfest on the cards
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers and his troops are in Italy as they bid to show their Dortmund hammering was just a one-off

arts.ttl: Atalanta vs Celtic: TV channel, kick-off time, team news, referee & VAR
arts.sum: Champions League football returns for the Celtic fans this week as Brendan Rodgers takes his team to Italy to face Atalanta. If you have a Celtic TV subscription, you can listen to live audio coverage of the Atalanta game and then watch a full match video replay.

arts.ttl: Celtic boss Brendan Rodgers insists he will maintain his ‘aggressive’ philosophy
arts.sum: Celtic had contrasting results in their opening two games with a 5-1 win over Slovan Bratislava followed by a 7-1 thrashing by Borussia Dortmund.

arts.ttl: Gasperini and Retegui give Celtic much to ponder
arts.sum: Gian Piero Gasperini free-scoring Atalanta and top scorer Mateo Retegui pose a threat to Celtic's Champions League hopes, writes Alasdair Lamont.

arts.ttl: Michael Stewart makes Cameron Carter-Vickers starting claim ahead of Celtic against Atalanta
arts.sum: Michael Stewart backs Cameron Carter-Vickers to start for Celtic against Atalanta One thing that needs to be noted is that Cameron Carter-Vickers, the club’s best defender, has been sidelined since September and he missed that Dortmund game, so that doesn’t help anyone’s cause.
